title: Better Furnaces & Chests
description: Enhance your world with tiered furnaces for lightning-fast smelting and massive tiered chests featuring a modern scrollable GUI with built-in sorting, stacking, and searching functionality. Fully configurable and performance-optimized.
body:
# 🔥 Better Furnaces & Chests
Upgrade your survival experience with **Better Furnaces & Chests**! This mod introduces tiered storage and smelting solutions, allowing you to scale your production and organization as you progress through your world.

[![Discord](https://img.shields.io/badge/Discord-JOIN-3f0f0f?style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&logoColor=white)](https://discord.gg/6NJZSxXFPV) [![Ko-fi](https://img.shields.io/badge/Ko--fi-SUPPORT-3f0f0f?style=for-the-badge&logo=kofi&logoColor=white)](https://ko-fi.com/bobotweaks) [![Fiverr](https://img.shields.io/badge/Fiverr-HIRE%20ME-3f0f0f?style=for-the-badge&logo=fiverr&logoColor=white)](https://www.fiverr.com/s/1qZlPl6)

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/iAAHz89HaEw" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

---

## Tiered Chests
Say goodbye to cluttered basements! Our custom chests offer massive storage in a single block space, featuring a smooth, **scrollable GUI** that handles even the largest inventories with ease.

- **Iron Chest:** 45 Slots (9x5)
- **Gold Chest:** 63 Slots (9x7)
- **Diamond Chest:** 81 Slots (9x9)
- **Netherite Chest:** 99 Slots (9x11)

### Key Features:
- **Scrollable Grid:** View your items clearly with our modern inventory layout.
- **Chest Animations:** Fully animated lids for a premium feel.
- **Custom Hardness:** Balanced progression. Diamond chests require diamond tools!

---

## Tiered Furnaces
Stop waiting for your ores to smelt! Our furnaces are designed for speed and efficiency.

- **Copper Furnace:** 1.25x Speed
- **Iron Furnace:** 2.0x Speed
- **Gold Furnace:** 3.0x Speed
- **Diamond Furnace:** 4.0x Speed
- **Netherite Furnace:** 8.0x Speed!

### Key Features:
- **Dynamic Lighting:** furnaces emit light and particles only when active.
- **Scalable Efficiency:** Save time and fuel as you upgrade.

---

## Performance Inventory Management
Managing a 99-slot chest shouldn't be a chore. We’ve added built-in tools to keep you organized:

- **Sort:** instantly organize your chest by item name or count.
- **Stack:** Merge scattered items into clean stacks.
- **Transfer:** Move your entire inventory into the chest with one click.
- **Take:** Empty the chest into your inventory in seconds.
- **Search:** Real-time filtering to find exactly what you need.

---

## Advanced Filtering (v1.3.0)
Upgrade your automation with the new **Filtering System** (Available for Gold, Diamond, and Netherite tiers).

- **Dual-Mode Filtering:** Toggle between **Input** and **Output** filters.
- **3x3 Ghost Grid:** Set filters without consuming items.
- **Automation Ready:** Hoppers and machines will respect your filter rules perfectly.
- **Smart UI:** Interactive panel with tooltips and real-time syncing.

---

## Global Support
Play in your native language! Better Furnaces & Chests now supports 20 languages with fully localized tooltips and UI elements.

- **Dynamic Tooltips:** Upgrade kits now tell you exactly what they do in your language.
- **Fully Localized UI:** Every button and label in the filtering panel is translated.

## Fully Configurable
Every server is different. Customize every aspect of the mod, including:
- Smelting speeds
- Inventory rows
- Block hardness
- Tool requirements (Axe/Pickaxe tiers)
- Furnace output multiplier

Found in:
### v1.1.0
 `config/better-furnaces-and-chests.cfg`.
### v1.2.0+
 `serverconfig/better-furnaces-and-chests-server.cfg`.
---
**Made with ❤️ by BoboTweaks.**
